wiki.summary: Overall, the song speaks to global White Supremacy and Eurocentrism, with a focus on a constant awareness of these forces and a fight to extinguish them. Also focuses on the need to be constantly speaking out against injustices and oppression and that ignorance enables this kind of injustices, mentioning that this is maintained by religion and the education system. The title is a reference to the Townships in apartheid South Africa, where black South Africans were segregated. Read more on Last.fm.
